inputs.label: Shear Force (F)
inputs.businessContext: The total shear force applied to the cross-section.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total shear force applied to the cross-section.

inputs.label: Cross-Sectional Area (A)
inputs.businessContext: The effective area resisting the shear force.

businessContext_i18n.en: The effective area resisting the shear force.

inputs.label: Number of Shear Planes
inputs.businessContext: 1 for single shear, 2 for double shear (e.g., bolted connections).

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 for single shear, 2 for double shear (e.g., bolted connections).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek kesme için 1, çift kesme için 2 (örn. cıvatalı bağlantılar).

inputs.label: Allowable Shear Stress (τ_allow)
inputs.businessContext: The material's maximum permissible shear stress as per design codes.

businessContext_i18n.en: The material's maximum permissible shear stress as per design codes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tasarım kodlarına göre malzemenin izin verilen maksimum kesme gerilmesi.

inputs.label: Safety Factor (SF)
inputs.businessContext: Design safety factor to account for uncertainties in load and material properties.

businessContext_i18n.en: Design safety factor to account for uncertainties in load and material properties.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yük ve malzeme özelliklerindeki belirsizlikleri hesaba katmak için tasarım güvenlik faktörü.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
